overall.description: Two characters sit at an outdoor cafe table in a futuristic cyberpunk city at night, surrounded by neon-lit buildings and wet pavement. The camera slowly orbits around them, eventually passing through tall bamboo plants that partially obscure the view. The scene features strong green and red neon lighting typical of the Cyberpunk 2077 aesthetic.

segments.scene_description: Two characters sit at an outdoor metal cafe table in a futuristic neon-lit city plaza, engaged in conversation over drinks. The camera slowly orbits around them, capturing the cyberpunk architecture with bright neon signs and reflective wet pavement. Red and white plastic chairs surround the small table while pedestrians walk in the distant background.

scene_state.functional_zone: outdoor cafe viewed through bamboo screen

events.description: camera moves past tall bamboo plants which begin to obscure the view of the cafe table
view becomes heavily framed by dense bamboo foliage, creating a natural green screen around the characters

agents.ego_description: continuing to orbit around the subjects, now viewing them through thick bamboo stalks

entered.detail: tall green bamboo stalks with leaves in a planter box, creating a natural screen
rectangular planter containing the bamboo vegetation

changed.to: center_mid partially obscured by bamboo foliage
left_mid partially obscured by bamboo stalks

segments.scene_description: The camera continues its slow orbit around the cafe table but now passes through a cluster of tall bamboo plants in planters. The green bamboo stalks increasingly obscure the view, creating a filtered perspective of the two characters who continue their conversation. The neon-lit cityscape remains visible in the background through the foliage, with the bamboo dominating the foreground.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous orbital camera movement that begins with a clear view of a futuristic city plaza and gradually transitions into a filtered perspective through dense foliage. It begins by circling two characters seated at a metal cafe table, capturing the surrounding red and white plastic chairs and the reflective wet pavement of the neon-lit cyberpunk architecture. As the camera continues its slow rotation, the open cityscape begins to be interrupted by the introduction of tall bamboo plants in planters. The scene then shifts as the camera passes directly through the cluster of greenery, with the green stalks increasingly obscuring the characters and the distant pedestrians. Finally, the view becomes a fragmented glimpse of the conversation and the glowing city lights, seen through the dominating foreground of the bamboo foliage.
